description: Composition Maroon round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbing around neckline and graphic on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water with like colors Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry on low Do not iron on print Do not dry clean It's all about collective energy. So spruce yourself up and feel like a hero in this disney T-shirt from bioworld. Featuring the Goofy, one of the most popular cartoon characters produced by disney, this tee has all that one needs to feel playful on a casual outing. Pair it with sneakers and denims. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
